core_principles: Clarity over Decoration: Internal tools must be frictionless.
Workflow-First: The UI guides the user through the 3-step linear process.
Data Density with Breathing Room: High density for image grids, but generous margins for containers.
Feedback is Key: Every action (upload, generate, select) has immediate visual feedback.
anti_patterns: No hidden actions - all primary workflow buttons must be visible

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-sm rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-white hover:bg-secondary/90 shadow-sm rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-all
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-all
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-all

cards.base: bg-white rounded-lg border border-border shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
cards.interactive: cursor-pointer ring-offset-background transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

stepper.container: flex items-center justify-between w-full max-w-3xl mx-auto mb-8

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure text-blue-500 is not used on white background for body text. Use text-blue-600 or darker.
accessibility.focus_states: All interactive elements must have visible focus rings.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Keep it clean white/gray.
Use 'Manrope' for all Headings (H1-H3). Use 'Inter' for body text.
Buttons should be prominent but not massive. Use 'h-10 px-4 py-2' as standard.
Feedback: Show loading spinners for all async actions (OCR, Generation).
Workflow: Use a Step Wizard approach. Don't show everything at once.
Logo: Display 'Artyplanet' in the top left. Icon Blue (#3B9FE8), Text Violet (#3B1FA8).
Data-TestID: Add data-testid to all inputs and buttons.
instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a 3-step workflow using a Stepper component.
Step 1: File Upload (Drag & Drop) -> Display Extracted Title (Simulated OCR) -> Editable Input.
Step 2: Show 10 placeholder 3D icons (Grid). Allow selecting exactly 2. Button 'Generate High Res'.
Step 3: Show 4 placeholder editorial illustrations (Grid). Allow selecting exactly 1. Button 'Finalize'.
Session Management: Save state to localStorage or a simple backend mock.
Use Shadcn UI components for consistency.
Ensure the UI is in French as requested.
